Thus output:

repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

Yes. Should we include the packet_id? The instructions: "Return the three-line status record." So just those three lines.

Thus answer.
</think>

repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
